Dashboard.subtitle: Ready to continue your cognitive expansion?

phase0.title: Phase 0: Networking Mindset
phase0.description: Understanding networks beyond usage, LAN/WAN/Internet. Network = Devices + Protocols + Data.

phase1.title: Phase 1: Fundamentals
phase1.description: OSI Model Layers (Physical to Application), TCP/IP architecture, IP Addresses, Subnet, Gateway, DNS.

phase2.title: Phase 2: Network Protocols
phase2.description: The language of the internet: HTTP/HTTPS, FTP, SSH, DHCP, DNS. Tools: Wireshark, Ping, Traceroute.

phase3.title: Phase 3: Hands-on Application
phase3.description: Practical setup of LAN, device connection, Router configuration. Tools: Cisco Packet Tracer, GNS3.

phase4.title: Phase 4: Intermediate Deep Dive
phase4.description: Subnetting (CIDR, Network/Broadcast calculation), Routing (Static, Dynamic - RIP, OSPF), Switching (VLAN, MAC Address Tables).

phase5.title: Phase 5: Advanced Networking
phase5.description: NAT, VPN, Firewall, Load Balancing. Tools: pfSense, OpenVPN.

phase6.title: Phase 6: Network Security
phase6.description: Sniffing, MITM attacks, Firewall Rules, IDS/IPS. Tools: Nmap, Kali Linux.

mindset-architecture.title: Phase 0: The Engineering Mindset
mindset-architecture.description: Understanding System Design before Code: Client vs Server, Request/Response Lifecycle, Data Persistence (Storage/Retrieval).

frontend-mastery.title: Phase 1: Frontend Dominance
frontend-mastery.description: The Trinity: HTML (Structure), CSS (Design), JavaScript (Logic). Framework: React (Components, State/Props, Hooks, Routing).

backend-core.title: Phase 2: The Backend Engine
backend-core.description: Primary Stack: Node.js + Express.js. Advanced Logic: REST APIs (JSON), Authentication, Middleware Patterns.

database-management.title: Phase 3: Data Control
database-management.description: Relational (SQL): PostgreSQL/MySQL. NoSQL: MongoDB. Mastery: CRUD Operations, Relationships, Indexing.

integration-logic.title: Phase 4: Full-Stack Integration
integration-logic.description: The Bridge: Connecting Frontend to Backend APIs. Data Flow: Fetching, Processing, and Storing end-to-end.

pro-tools.title: Phase 5: Professional Toolkit
pro-tools.description: Testing: Postman for API testing. DevOps Lite: Docker (Containerization), Nginx (Reverse Proxy).

deployment-cicd.title: Phase 6: Deployment & Scaling
deployment-cicd.description: Infrastructure: Hosting, Domains, CI/CD Pipelines. Platforms: Vercel (Frontend), Railway (Backend).

advanced-architecture.title: Phase 7: Beyond the Basics
advanced-architecture.description: Security: JWT & OAuth. Real-time: WebSockets (Socket.io). Scale: Microservices & Caching (Redis).

web3-mindset.title: Phase 0: The Web3 Mindset
web3-mindset.description: Transitioning from Web2 to Web3: Decentralization, Blockchain, and Ownership.

blockchain-protocols.title: Phase 1: Blockchain Protocols
blockchain-protocols.description: The Mechanics: Blocks, Mining, Gas Fees, and Transactions. Ethereum & Polygon.

wallets-identity.title: Phase 2: Assets & Identity
wallets-identity.description: Security: Public/Private Keys, Wallets (MetaMask), and Signing Transactions.

solidity-mastery.title: Phase 3: Smart Contracts Core
solidity-mastery.description: Language: Solidity basics. Mastery: Variables, Functions, Modifiers, and Error Handling.

web3-dev-tools.title: Phase 4: Developer Ecosystem
web3-dev-tools.description: Tools: Remix IDE, Hardhat framework, and local testing with Ganache.

dapp-frontend-integration.title: Phase 5: DApp Integration
dapp-frontend-integration.description: The Bridge: React + Ethers.js. Connect Wallet and Smart Contract Interaction.

web3-projects.title: Phase 6: Real-World DApps
web3-projects.description: Builds: NFT Marketplaces, ERC-20 Tokens, and DAO Governance Systems.

advanced-defi-l2.title: Phase 7: Advanced DeFi & L2
advanced-defi-l2.description: Ecosystems: Liquidity, Layer 2 Scaling (Arbitrum/Optimism), and Oracles (Chainlink).

web3-security-auditing.title: Phase 8: Security & Auditing
web3-security-auditing.description: The Shield: Smart Contract Auditing, Reentrancy Attacks, and Common Vulnerabilities.

ai-vs-programming.title: Phase 0: The AI Mindset
ai-vs-programming.description: Understanding the paradigm shift: Traditional Programming vs Machine Learning logic.

mathematics-for-ai.title: Phase 1: The Mathematical Armor
mathematics-for-ai.description: The Pillars: Linear Algebra, Probability, Statistics, and Calculus for optimization.

python-data-science-stack.title: Phase 2: The Control Languages
python-data-science-stack.description: Industry Standard: Python (NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib) for data science.

data-analysis-eda.title: Phase 3: Data Handling & EDA
data-analysis-eda.description: Mastery: Data Cleaning, Exploratory Data Analysis, and Jupyter Notebooks.

machine-learning-fundamentals.title: Phase 4: Machine Learning Core
machine-learning-fundamentals.description: The Learning Types: Supervised, Unsupervised, and Reinforcement Learning (Scikit-learn).

deep-learning-neural-networks.title: Phase 5: Deep Learning & Neural Nets
deep-learning-neural-networks.description: The Tech Stack: TensorFlow, PyTorch, ANN, CNN, RNN, and Transformers.

ai-real-world-applications.title: Phase 6: AI Applications
ai-real-world-applications.description: Fields: Computer Vision, Natural Language Processing, and Speech Recognition.

ai-projects-lab.title: Phase 7: Neural Projects
ai-projects-lab.description: Practical Builds: Classifiers, Recommendation Systems, and custom Chatbots.

ai-model-deployment.title: Phase 8: Deployment & Cloud
ai-model-deployment.description: Production: FastAPI, Cloud Deployment (AWS/GCP), and Hugging Face.

data-mindset.title: Phase 0: The Data Mindset
data-mindset.description: Understanding how data flows through systems. Structured vs Unstructured data.

data-core-fundamentals.title: Phase 1: The Core Fundamentals
data-core-fundamentals.description: SQL mastery, Linux/Bash scripting, and Python for data manipulation.

etl-mastery.title: Phase 2: The Heart of Data - ETL
etl-mastery.description: Extract, Transform, and Load: The core of the data pipeline.

data-warehousing.title: Phase 4: Data Warehousing
data-warehousing.description: Organizing data for massive analytical queries with BigQuery and Redshift.

big-data-systems.title: Phase 5: Big Data Systems
big-data-systems.description: Distributed Systems architecture and Batch vs. Streaming processing.

data-pipelines-architecture.title: Phase 6: Building Data Pipelines
data-pipelines-architecture.description: API to Database to Dashboard: Real-time Kafka + Spark pipelines.

cloud-data-engineering.title: Phase 7: Cloud Data Engineering
cloud-data-engineering.description: AWS and Google Cloud (GCP) S3, Serverless, and Cloud Compute.

advanced-data-governance.title: Phase 8: Advanced Governance
advanced-data-governance.description: Data Lakes vs. Warehouses, Governance, Quality Control, and Monitoring.

Curriculum.offlineDesc: This specific difficulty tier is not yet configured.
Curriculum.noPhases: No phases discovered for this difficulty tier yet.
